title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Time to choose from Dravidian model 2.0, double engine, Tamil nationalism and film star
description: The ruling DMK, led by Chief Minister M.K. Stalin, and the Opposition AIADMK, led by Edappadi K. Palaniswami, remain the major players. But NTK leader Seeman and actor and TVK founder C. Joseph Vijay threaten to disrupt the bipartisan politics the State has seen over the past five decades
